topics.title: Internationalization Updates
topics.summary: Recent updates to the npmx project include the addition of Romanian translations, addressing a previously missing locale. This enhancement improves accessibility for Romanian-speaking users and aligns with the project's commitment to internationalization.

topics.title: New Package Release
topics.summary: A new package, pnpm dlx setup-trusted-publishing, has been released, enabling users to publish a no-code stub for their packages. This tool simplifies the configuration of trusted publishing and updates package.json with necessary access and provenance information.
